search_queries_used: site:dha.gov.ae laboratory monitoring chronic conditions statin lipid guideline PDF
site:nice.org.uk NG238 lipid modification recommendations follow-up
site:who.int cardiovascular risk lipid monitoring guideline
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
Dose-bearing prescribing content was not mapped.
Nonofficial tools do not establish an exact documentation workflow source.
population_applicability: Partial: the DHA source covers chronic laboratory monitoring and NICE covers adults receiving cardiovascular risk or lipid-modification review; the legacy workflow has no explicit adult-only filter.
setting_applicability: Direct for clinician-led chronic laboratory and lipid follow-up documentation; prescribing decisions remain outside the workflow evidence mapping.
UAE_applicability: Direct for DHA laboratory-monitoring fields, with international NICE guidance used for additional adult risk, lifestyle, and follow-up context requiring UAE clinician review.
recency_verification: The current DHA Issue 2 laboratory-monitoring guideline and NICE NG238 recommendations were rechecked on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer DHA issue was identified; NICE NG238 remains the current official lipid-modification guideline.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports chronic lipid and statin monitoring as a virtual chronic-condition use case.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Includes hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hypercholesterolaemia/hyperlipidaemia among the listed chronic conditions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped lipid, renal, liver, glycaemic, blood-pressure, and BMI monitoring fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped adverse-effect and laboratory monitoring fields without selecting treatment or dose.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Links statin review to documented ALT and cholesterol or lipid results before clinician prescribing decisions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped cardiovascular-risk and documented lifestyle-review fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped lipid-assessment identity, blood-pressure, BMI, renal, liver, and glycaemic fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped results, adherence, adverse-effect, medication-review, repeat-testing, and arranged-follow-up documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented adherence, adverse-effect review, lifestyle and cardiovascular risk discussion, repeat lipid and liver testing, annual medication review, and agreed follow-up without mapping doses.

unresolved_source_gaps: The workflow does not enforce the adult population in the NICE source.
Chest-pain negatives, generic vital signs, heart rate, general appearance, and generic clinician plans remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, medicine selection, dose, and risk interpretation remain clinician-stated and qualified clinician review is still required.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
